title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
